zh.lifeSummary: 當Iseult Mountjoy於1307年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘時，她的父親Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset3歲，母親Margaret Porter3歲。她於1340年與Sir John Blount I在英國德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年6月13日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iseult Mountjoy于1307年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘时，她的父亲Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset3岁，母亲Margaret Porter3岁。她于1340年与Sir John Blount I在英国德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年6月13日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mountjoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Gloucestershire; of Norman origin): habitational name, ultimately from Montjoie, a crusaders’ name derived from that of the mountain in Palestine from which the first view of Jerusalem was obtained. The name was adopted for several places in western Europe (notably Montjoie-Saint-Martin in Manche), and this, or the original, could have given rise to the English surname.

nameMeanings.name: Iseult
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isolde  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Iseult Mountjoy was born in 1307, in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, was 3 and her mother, Margaret Porter, was 3. She married Sir John Blount I in 1340, in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 June 1391, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iseult Mountjoy est née en 1307, à Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, avait 3 ans et sa mère, Margaret Porter, avait 3 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Blount I en 1340, à Elvaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 juin 1391, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iseult Mountjoy 1307 in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset 3 und ihre Mutter Margaret Porter 3. Sie hat 1340 in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England Sir John Blount I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Juni 1391 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir John Blount I nel 1340, nel Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 giugno 1391, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Iseult Mountjoyが1307年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトハトチ ビーウチャンップで生まれた時，父Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somersetは3歳，母Margaret Porterは3歳であった。1340年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエルヴァストンでSir John Blount Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年6月13日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Iseult Mountjoy(이)가 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 해트치 보챔프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset(은)는 3세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Porter(은)는 3세였다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 더비실르 엘바스턴에서 Sir John Blount I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 6월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iseult Mountjoy nasceu em 1307, em Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, tinha 3 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Porter, tinha 3 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Blount I em 1340, em Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de junho de 1391, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 84 anos.

ro.Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England: Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iseult Mountjoy родилась в 1307 г. в местности хач бочамп, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset было 3 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Porter, 3. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Blount I в 1340 г. в местности элвастон, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 июня 1391 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iseult Mountjoy nació en 1307, en Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, tenía 3 años y su mamá, Margaret Porter, tenía 3 años. Se casó con Sir John Blount I en 1340, en Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de junio de 1391, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años.
